properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord please bless our family Help us live in harmony Let Your holy presence fill our home We believe Your Word is true We put You first in all we do Standing on the promise faithfully So Lord, please bless our family

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: One day God called Abraham away To a land of his own, to the promise of his day When he obeyed and followed through God said I’ll be blessing you And all the family’s…?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It seems that in the times we live today Marriages and families are falling by the way But God has promised He will bless Those who live in holiness There is hope in the promise of… today

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Standing, standing Standing on the promises of God my Savior (Oooh, oooh) Standing, standing….

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord please bless our family Help us live in harmony Let Your holy presence fill our home Ooh, we believe Your Word is true We put You first in all we do Standing on the promise faithfully So Lord, please bless our family So Lord, please bless our family
